subject: Order arrived with missing items
resolution: Customer's order was missing a side. Walked them through Orders → Get help → Report an issue → select missing items. Refunded the missing item as FoodAssist AI credit instantly.

subject: Food arrived cold
resolution: Order was delayed in traffic and arrived cold. Apologized, refunded 50% to the original card (3-5 business days), and applied a $5 credit for the inconvenience.

subject: Order is very late
resolution: Courier was stuck due to weather. Showed the customer the live map, confirmed the courier was en route, and offered a credit since it was over 15 minutes past the estimate.

subject: Payment declined at checkout
resolution: Card had expired. Guided customer to Account → Payment → Add card to add a new card, then retry checkout. Order went through successfully.

subject: Charged twice for one order
resolution: One charge was a temporary authorization hold that dropped off automatically within a few days. Confirmed only one charge settled. No action needed.

subject: Can't reset password - no email
resolution: Reset email was in spam. Confirmed correct account email; reset links are valid 1 hour. Customer reset successfully. Suggested Sign in with code as an alternative since they signed up by phone.

subject: Order marked delivered but never received
resolution: Reviewed courier GPS drop-off; address had a wrong unit number saved. Refunded the order in full and helped the customer fix their saved address.

subject: Need to cancel order after restaurant started cooking
resolution: Explained orders can't be cancelled free once the restaurant starts preparing. As a goodwill gesture, offered partial FoodAssist AI credit. Customer accepted.

subject: How to cancel FoodAssist Plus
resolution: Walked customer through Account → FoodAssist Plus → Manage membership → Cancel. Benefits continue until end of current billing period; membership fee is non-refundable mid-cycle.

subject: Wrong delivery address on active order
resolution: Courier had not yet picked up, so edited the delivery address to a nearby location via Orders → Edit delivery details. Large changes aren't possible once a courier is assigned.

subject: Promo code not working
resolution: Order was below the promo's minimum order value and the code had an expiry. Explained the requirements; customer added an item to meet the minimum and the discount applied.

subject: Allergy concern about a dish
resolution: Advised that allergen tags come from the restaurant and aren't guaranteed. Recommended adding an allergy note at checkout and messaging the restaurant directly. Escalated to a human for the severe-allergy case.

subject: Restaurant missing from the app
resolution: Restaurant was outside the customer's delivery radius and temporarily paused for being busy. Suggested scheduling for later or trying a nearby address. It reappeared once reopened.

subject: Tip adjustment after delivery
resolution: Customer wanted to increase the tip after a great delivery. Showed them the order screen tip adjustment, available up to 1 hour after delivery. 100% goes to the courier.

subject: Unauthorized order on account
resolution: Suspected account compromise. Had customer change password, signed out unknown devices under Security → Devices, froze the account, and refunded the unauthorized order after review.
